Metadata.title: Dhaka Bus & Metro - Fare, Routes & Live Map Simulation
Metadata.description: Find bus routes, calculate fares, and track Dhaka Metro Rail MRT Line-6 trains in real-time with an interactive live map simulation.
Metadata.keywords: Dhaka bus routes, bus fare Bangladesh, bus vara, dhaka bus vara, dhaka metro vara, metro rail vara, bus bhara, BRTA fare rate, Dhaka Metro bus, bus stop finder, public transport Dhaka, bus route map, Dhaka city bus, bus ticket price Bangladesh, Dhaka Metro Rail, MRT Line 6, metro fare, live metro map simulation, metro schedule

Home.title: Find Your Bus Route &
Home.subtitle: Browse {totalRoutes} official bus routes across Dhaka Metro Area. View stops, distances, and get instant fare estimates.
Home.noRoutes: No routes found. Try a different search.
Home.noRoutesAdvice: Try searching by route code like "A-101" or a stop like "Mirpur-10"
Home.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to navigate public transit in Dhaka in one single place.
Home.fMetroDesc: Real-time physics simulated train tracking, nearest station detection, walking directions, and fare calculations.
Home.fBusDesc: Browse all city bus operators, operational timings, active routes, and full stop sequences.
Home.fFareDesc: Calculate direct or transfer-connecting bus fares and view full stop-to-stop fare matrix charts.

Calculator.metaTitle: Bus Fare Calculator (Direct & Connecting Routes) - Dhaka Bus
Calculator.metaDescription: Calculate bus fares between any two stops in Dhaka. Supports both direct routes and 1-transfer connecting route combinations to find the cheapest transit options.
Calculator.metaKeywords: Dhaka bus fare calculator, bus transfer Dhaka, connecting bus routes, Dhaka bus route finder, bus fare estimation Bangladesh, Dhaka public transit map, bus vara calculator, dhaka bus vara, bus bhara dhaka
Calculator.title: Calculate Your Bus Fare
Calculator.subtitle: Find direct routes between any two stops and get instant fare estimates.
Calculator.journeySelect: Select your stops to find routes.
Calculator.resultsEmpty: Enter your journey details to see results.
Calculator.noDirectRoutes: No direct routes found between these two stops.
Calculator.tryDifferent: Try selecting "All Routes" or different stops.
Calculator.resultsWillAppear: Results will appear here once you calculate your fare.
Calculator.noRoutesFound: No direct or connecting routes found between these stops.

RouteCalc.title: Fare Calculator
RouteCalc.desc: Select boarding and alighting stops to estimate fare.

Settings.dialogDesc: Customize the fare rate used across all calculations. Changes are saved to your browser.
Settings.rounded: Fares are rounded up to the nearest ৳5.

Chart.metaTitle: Fare Chart - Dhaka Bus Fare & Routes
Chart.metaDescription: View the complete fare matrix for all stops on any Dhaka bus route. Compare fares between every combination of stops.
Chart.metaKeywords: Dhaka bus fare chart, bus route matrix, stop to stop fare Dhaka, Dhaka bus routes, BRTA fare table, bus stop distance Bangladesh, dhaka bus vara list, bus vara chart, bus bhara chart
Chart.title: Full Route Fare Chart
Chart.subtitle: View the complete fare matrix for all stops on a selected route.
Chart.chooseRouteDesc: Choose a route to see the fare between every combination of stops.

About.metaDescription: Learn about Dhaka Bus Fare & Routes, an open-source project making public transit information accessible in the Dhaka Metro Area.
About.title: About This Project
About.subtitle: Dhaka Bus Fare & Routes is an open-source initiative to make public transit information accessible and structured.
About.sourceDesc: The route and distance data is maintained collaboratively in a public GitHub repository. You are welcome to contribute updates or corrections.
About.f1Desc: Covering hundreds of official and unofficial bus routes operating in Dhaka.
About.f2Desc: Fare estimation based on exact km distance between stops according to official BRTA rates.
About.f3Desc: Data and code are open for the community to improve and build upon.
About.f4Desc: Fully responsive design that works great on phones, tablets, and desktops.

Footer.description: Making public transit information accessible and structured for everyone in the Dhaka Metro Area.

Buses.metaKeywords: Dhaka bus companies, bus operators Dhaka, Achim Paribahan route, Shikhor Paribahan, Dhaka city bus list, bus timing Dhaka, local bus dhaka, dhaka bus vara

Buses.subtitle: Search and browse all city bus companies operating across the Dhaka Metro Area.

Metro.metaTitle: Dhaka Metro Rail - Live Map Simulation, Fare & Schedule
Metro.metaDescription: Track Dhaka Metro Rail MRT Line-6 trains in real-time on an interactive map simulation. Calculate fares, view schedules, and find your nearest station.
Metro.metaKeywords: Dhaka metro rail, MRT Line 6, metro fare, metro schedule, live train map simulation, Dhaka metro stations, metro pass, dhaka metro vara, metro rail vara, metro bhara, metro rail ticket price
Metro.title: Dhaka Metro Rail
Metro.subtitle: MRT Line-6 · Uttara North to Motijheel
Metro.enableLocation: Enable location to see your position on the map
Metro.selectDifferentStations: Select two different stations to calculate fare
Metro.fareNote: Fares are based on the official MRT Line-6 slab-based pricing.
Metro.cardDiscountNote: MRT Pass / Rapid Pass holders get 10% discount.
Metro.ticketInfoDesc: Tickets can be purchased at station counters or Ticket Vending Machines (TVM).
Metro.mrtPassInfo: MRT Pass costs ৳500 (৳200 card + ৳300 credit). Valid for 10 years.
Metro.childFare: Children under 5 travel free with an adult.
Metro.seniorDiscount: Senior citizens (65+) receive a 25% discount on single-journey tickets (NID required).
Metro.disabledDiscount: Persons with disabilities receive a 25% discount on single-journey tickets (with 'Subarna' ID card).
Metro.studentDiscount: Students receive a 25% discount on single-journey tickets (planned soon).
Metro.freedomFighterDiscount: Freedom fighters travel for free with a valid ID.
Metro.childrenFreeUnderHeight: Children 90 cm or below in height travel for free when accompanied by a guardian.
Metro.luggageRules: Limit: 15 kg max. Bags must not exceed 22"x14"x9" and cartons 18"x18"x18". Sacks (bosta) and smelly/hazardous items are strictly prohibited.
Metro.mapMetaTitle: Live Metro Map Simulation - Dhaka Metro Rail
Metro.mapMetaDescription: Track Dhaka Metro Rail MRT Line-6 trains in real-time on an interactive map simulation with your live GPS location.
Metro.mapTrackerDesc: Track simulated train positions in real-time, view live ETAs, and check next train schedules with GPS tracking.
Metro.stationsDirectoryDesc: Select any station to view its live status and location on the interactive map.
Metro.shareLocationBanner: Share your location to track your live train movement
Metro.tooFarToTrack: You must be within 1km of a metro station to track your journey.
Metro.trackJourneyDrawerDescription: Share your live location to help others see the train moving in real-time.
Metro.locationRequired: Location access is required to track your journey.
Metro.saveTripPrompt: Want to save this trip to your history?

Auth.welcomeDesc: Enter your credentials to access your account.
Auth.createDesc: Enter your details below to create your account.
Auth.shortPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
Auth.shortName: Name must be at least 2 characters

Account.desc: Manage your profile and security preferences.
